sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n95841" key="speiste/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σπειστέον</orth>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">σπένδω</etym>) <sense id="n95841.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must pour a drink-offering</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:10:65" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.65</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
